name: Aneesh Simha
tagline: Software engineer, builder, and visual experimenter based in New York City.
bio: I'm a software engineer with a background in data engineering and infrastructure. I studied Materials Science at UIUC and Computer Science at Santa Clara University. I've worked at startups and growth-stage companies — most recently as a Founding Engineer at Minerva Data, where I architected the data platform from scratch, and before that at Komodo Health building data pipelines and infrastructure at scale. I'm interested in the space where engineering meets creativity: building tools, experimenting with generative art, and writing about the things I'm learning.
